title: neoaulacolepis
intro: Neoaulacolepis is a type of flowering plant, specifically a genus of flowering plants in the family Celastraceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is also known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Neoaulacolepis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
